name: Pursuit of Wealth Consulting INC
description_short: Faith-driven credit repair and financial strategy firm offering credit dispute services, tax solutions, and business credit building for families and entrepreneurs.
description_long:
Pursuit of Wealth Consulting INC is a credit repair and financial strategy firm founded by Samia Scott, a credit strategist and tax professional who rebuilt her own finances after experiencing homelessness and financial hardship. The company positions itself as faith-aligned and targets families and entrepreneurs seeking to restore damaged credit and build long-term financial stability. Scott's background as a legal systems advocate and tax professional shapes the company's approach to credit restoration and broader financial planning.

The company offers multiple interconnected services: credit dispute and restoration (done-for-you or DIY options), tax preparation for side hustlers and business owners, business credit building from startup to growth stage, legal strategy tools for consumers facing lawsuits or wage garnishment (eligibility-required), faith-based mentorship and coaching, and B2B partnership programs for realtors and lenders. They also provide free resources including checklists, legal templates, and financial organization tools.

Pursuit of Wealth distinguishes itself through explicit faith-based messaging and values alignment rather than transactional positioning. The company emphasizes legacy-building over lifestyle consumption, legal strategy over shortcuts, and combines credit repair with tax and business credit services under one roof. Scott's personal testimony and the focus on empowerment and education (versus quick fixes) are central to their brand identity. They offer both service packages and educational/DIY options.

The company operates primarily online with no brick-and-mortar locations. Pricing is not transparent on the website—prospects must book calls or text for quotes. The legal services component requires an eligibility review, which is appropriate but adds a qualifying step. No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of results are visible on the website, making outcome claims difficult to verify. The faith-forward messaging will resonate strongly with target audiences but may narrow appeal.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers both done-for-you and DIY credit repair options, giving clients choice and cost flexibility
Combines credit repair, tax services, and business credit building—addressing multiple financial pain points for entrepreneurs
Founder has documented personal financial recovery story, providing credibility and relatability for distressed clients
Provides free resources (checklists, templates, legal tools) to support self-directed financial improvement
Legal strategy services available for high-stakes situations (lawsuits, judgments, wage garnishment) with eligibility screening
B2B partnerships with realtors, lenders, and auto dealers suggest institutional trust and referral relationships
Emphasis on education and system-building rather than promoting quick-fix or legally questionable tactics
cons: No pricing transparency—all costs require calling, texting, or booking a consultation, making comparison shopping difficult
No independent customer reviews, ratings, or third-party outcome verification visible on website to validate claims
Strong faith-based messaging and values filtering may exclude secular clients or those uncomfortable with religious framing
Legal services access is gated behind eligibility review, which may discourage inquiries and creates friction in the sales process
Limited detail on specific dispute strategies, success rates, or typical timelines for credit restoration outcomes
best_for: Faith-driven families and entrepreneurs rebuilding credit after financial hardship or major life disruption
Side hustlers and business owners needing integrated credit repair and tax support
Clients seeking credit restoration combined with mentorship and legacy-building financial strategy
Referral partners (realtors, lenders, auto dealers) looking to prepare clients for funding approval
diagnosis: Pursuit of Wealth Consulting is best suited for faith-driven individuals and entrepreneurs who value values-aligned financial advice and need integrated credit, tax, and business credit solutions. The main caveat is lack of public pricing, customer reviews, and outcome documentation—prospects should request detailed service descriptions, pricing, and references before committing.
services: Credit dispute and error correction (done-for-you and DIY options)
Credit report accuracy review and correction
Tax preparation and tax strategy for entrepreneurs and side hustlers
Business credit building and structuring from startup through growth
LLC formation guidance and business credit separation from personal credit
Legal strategy tools and court document preparation (eligibility-required)
Lawsuit, judgment, and wage garnishment response support
B2B partnership and referral programs for financial professionals
Free financial tools, checklists, and legal templates
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
